output.chain_gate_note: ready=true means this payment instruction passes CBPR+ pre-validation for STP; ready=false means one or more checks failed and remediation is required before submission.
output.pii_note: IBAN, BIC, and LEI are structural payment identifiers, not personal data. All checks are format/structure only. No real party PII processed -- use synthetic identifiers for testing.
output.regulatory_basis: SWIFT CBPR+ Structured Address Migration Bulletin; BIS CPMI d218; ISO 13616 IBAN; ISO 9362 BIC; ISO 17442 LEI; ISO 20022 pacs.008.001.10
output.table_source: SWIFT CBPR+ Structured Address Migration Bulletin (swift.com/cbpr-plus-migration); BIS CPMI d218; ISO 13616:2020 IBAN; ISO 9362:2022 BIC; ISO 17442:2020 LEI; ISO 20022 pacs.008.001.10 (iso20022.org)
